---
name: convert-asset
version: 1.0.0
label: "Convert Asset"
description: "Convert a store asset between provider formats"
group: "Utilities"
placement: startup
scope: global
classes:
  project-terminal: 80
---

Use the /convert-asset command to convert an asset from one AI CLI provider format to another.

Usage: Specify the source and target as arguments, e.g. 'claude/command/checkpoint to codex'
